panels.title: Total Requests (last 1h)
panels.description: Total number of HTTP server requests observed in the last hour.

targets.rawSql: SELECT sum(Count) AS requests FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE MetricName IN ('http.server.request.duration', 'http.server.duration') AND TimeUnix >= toDateTime($__from/1000) AND TimeUnix <= toDateTime($__to/1000)

panels.title: Error Rate (last 1h)
panels.description: Percentage of requests with HTTP status code 500 or higher.

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(100.0 * sumIf(Count, toInt32OrNull(coalesce(nullIf(Attributes['http.response.status_code'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['http.status_code'], ''), '0')) >= 500) / greatest(sum(Count), 1), 2) AS error_rate_pct FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE MetricName IN ('http.server.request.duration', 'http.server.duration') AND TimeUnix >= toDateTime($__from/1000) AND TimeUnix <= toDateTime($__to/1000)

panels.title: Avg Response Time (last 1h)
panels.description: Average end-to-end request latency from trace durations over the last hour.

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(avg(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS avg_ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= toDateTime($__from/1000) AND Timestamp <= toDateTime($__to/1000)

panels.title: Throughput (req/sec, last 1h)
panels.description: Average request throughput over the last hour.

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(sum(Count) / 3600.0, 4) AS req_per_sec FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE MetricName IN ('http.server.request.duration', 'http.server.duration') AND TimeUnix >= toDateTime($__from/1000) AND TimeUnix <= toDateTime($__to/1000)

panels.title: Request Rate (per minute)
panels.description: Per-minute request volume trend for HTTP server traffic.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, sum(Count) AS requests FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE MetricName IN ('http.server.request.duration', 'http.server.duration') AND TimeUnix >= toDateTime($__from/1000) AND TimeUnix <= toDateTime($__to/1000) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Avg Response Time per minute (ms)
panels.description: Per-minute average end-to-end request latency from trace durations.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(Timestamp) AS time, round(avg(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS avg_ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= toDateTime($__from/1000) AND Timestamp <= toDateTime($__to/1000) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Requests by HTTP Status Code (last 1h)
panels.description: Distribution of request counts by HTTP response status code.

targets.rawSql: WITH reqs AS (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(Attributes['http.response.status_code'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['http.status_code'], ''), 'other') AS sc, Count FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE MetricName IN ('http.server.request.duration', 'http.server.duration') AND TimeUnix >= toDateTime($__from/1000) AND TimeUnix <= toDateTime($__to/1000)) SELECT sumIf(Count, sc = '200') AS `200`, sumIf(Count, sc = '201') AS `201`, sumIf(Count, sc = '204') AS `204`, sumIf(Count, sc = '301') AS `301`, sumIf(Count, sc = '302') AS `302`, sumIf(Count, sc = '304') AS `304`, sumIf(Count, sc = '400') AS `400`, sumIf(Count, sc = '401') AS `401`, sumIf(Count, sc = '403') AS `403`, sumIf(Count, sc = '404') AS `404`, sumIf(Count, sc = '500') AS `500`, sumIf(Count, sc = '502') AS `502`, sumIf(Count, sc = '503') AS `503`, sumIf(Count, sc = 'other') AS other FROM reqs

panels.title: Top Routes by Request Count (last 1h)
panels.description: Top mapped routes by request volume with average and max end-to-end latency from traces.

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['http.method'], ''), 'unknown') AS method, coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['http.route'], ''), nullIf(SpanAttributes['http.target'], ''), 'unknown') AS route, count() AS requests, round(avg(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS avg_ms, round(max(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS max_ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= toDateTime($__from/1000) AND Timestamp <= toDateTime($__to/1000) AND coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['http.route'], ''), nullIf(SpanAttributes['http.target'], ''), 'unknown') != 'unknown' GROUP BY method, route ORDER BY requests DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: 4xx vs 5xx Error Rate per minute
panels.description: Client and server error counts per minute to distinguish failure classes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, sumIf(Count, toInt32OrNull(coalesce(nullIf(Attributes['http.response.status_code'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['http.status_code'], ''), '0')) BETWEEN 400 AND 499) AS client_errors_4xx, sumIf(Count, toInt32OrNull(coalesce(nullIf(Attributes['http.response.status_code'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['http.status_code'], ''), '0')) >= 500) AS server_errors_5xx FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE MetricName IN ('http.server.request.duration', 'http.server.duration') AND TimeUnix >= toDateTime($__from/1000) AND TimeUnix <= toDateTime($__to/1000) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Requests by HTTP Method per minute
panels.description: Per-minute request breakdown by HTTP method.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, sumIf(Count, coalesce(nullIf(Attributes['http.request.method'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['http.method'], '')) = 'GET') AS GET, sumIf(Count, coalesce(nullIf(Attributes['http.request.method'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['http.method'], '')) = 'POST') AS POST, sumIf(Count, coalesce(nullIf(Attributes['http.request.method'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['http.method'], '')) = 'PUT') AS PUT, sumIf(Count, coalesce(nullIf(Attributes['http.request.method'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['http.method'], '')) = 'DELETE') AS DELETE FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE MetricName IN ('http.server.request.duration', 'http.server.duration') AND TimeUnix >= toDateTime($__from/1000) AND TimeUnix <= toDateTime($__to/1000) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
